ads.author: John Olsen
ads.title: Authentic Japanese “Kariyushi Okinawa Special Version” pachislo machine manufactured by Takasago
ads.description: Comes with 500 shiny perfectly minted Japanese game tokens (Execute a deep dive and with a few basic mods, convert this Amazingly rare perfectly working machine to accept quarters. This is a genuine Japanese casino-style pachislo cabinet — not a toy replica or modern imitation. Beautifully illuminated with strong audio, animated reel action, and classic Japanese arcade/casino aesthetics. Machine features: * Working reel system * Illuminated bonus display * Skill-stop gameplay * Original internal electronics * Hopper/token system * Integrated speakers and sound * Japanese artwork and Okinawa-themed cabinet * Factory Takasago hardware and boards * Home-use converted setup Condition is exceptionally clean for its age and presents beautifully when powered on. Perfect for: * game rooms * theater rooms * arcade collections * man caves * RV lounge setups * collector displays Heavy commercial-grade steel cabinet construction. Approximate weight: 75–90 lbs. Local pickup only. For collectible/home entertainment purposes only. * “collector pachislo” * “Japanese arcade machine” * “home entertainment machine”

ads.author: Chris Miller
ads.title: Hunnyball
ads.description: Hunnyball. Be the envy of the next beach bonfire or backyard 4th of July party. $100 pick up in PCB near Pier Park https://hunnyball.com/products/hunnyball-complete-set Hunnyball is a beach and yard game made for players of all ages and levels of athleticism. If you can catch and throw, you can play. It's perfect for groups that like a little competition in their leisure. ACTIVE Young or old, beach or park - it doesn’t matter. A good game of Hunnyball will get you moving. Especially if you have a competitive side. FOR GROUPS Made to play 2v2, but games go quickly, and even winners get tired. Find a good spot and entertain your group for hours. Try 3v3 if you are younger, or tire easily. EASY SETUP Setup takes two minutes. Just unfold the wings on the board, lay out the boundaries, and you're good to go. https://m.youtube.com/shorts/QPSd4X7zcbg

ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Capcom Bowling (Capcom, 1988) This is a Capcom Bowling upright arcade cabinet in a Centipede Cabinet. Condition: - Cabinet is very old and needs a lot of love. - Monitor does not currently power on — likely needs new caps. - Nothing comes on at the moment; best to start troubleshooting with the power supply and work your way from there. - Sold as-is. Highlights: - Classic Capcom sports arcade with bowling gameplay. - Upright cabinet design from the golden age of arcades. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a retro collection. Important: - Price is $200, or best offer - Serious buyers only. Price Breakdown: Capcom Bowling PCS ($40) Control Panel and Trackball ($60) Cabinet ($100) CRT (dunno if its dead so $0?) ads.description: Up for your consideration is a California Speed Arcade driving game. It plays as is but would definitely benefit from a LCD monitor. I’ve had this machine for about 8 years and it has just started buzzing when you turn it on. I don’t know anything about these but I did talk to an arcade dealer and he said that it’s likely inference or the sound board. This machine does have the ability to be paired with another machine. Will consider trading up or down for a slot machine, pinball machine, vintage gas pump, man cave stuff.
